_patch_meta.description: C10 DimReview R060 faithfulness — 7 group dimension assignments + registry stamp + 1 SD pointer. 2 dimension changes from automated labels. Manual application required.

operations.description: 872-001 H5414G natan (covenant land giving) — Moral Character / GOD. Automated label confirmed; dominant_subject set.
872-002 H5414G natan (giving from compassion) — Relational Disposition / GOD. CHANGED from Volition: divine compassion in giving is relational orientation, not a volitional act.
872-003 H5414G natan (giving inner capacities — wisdom, spirit) — Cognition / HUMAN. Automated label confirmed; dominant_subject set.
872-004 H5414G natan (giving over in judgment) — Moral Character / GOD. Automated label confirmed; dominant_subject set.
872-005 H5414G natan (human self-giving) — Relational Disposition / HUMAN. Automated label confirmed; dominant_subject set.

872-006 H5414G natan (giving glory — ascription of worth) — Divine-Human Correspondence / HUMAN. Automated label confirmed; dominant_subject set. Human gives glory; divine claim to glory is the corresponding pole.
872-007 H5414G natan (ashes to beauty, mourning to gladness) — Transformation / HUMAN. CHANGED from Emotion-Positive: the group names the transformation process, not the resultant emotion.

record.description: R060 faithfulness (natan H5414G) shows that a single property term can serve four distinct inner-being dimensions across its verse corpus — Moral Character (covenant commitment), Relational Disposition (compassion), Transformation (eschatological restoration), and Divine-Human Correspondence (glory-ascription). This illustrates the programmatic principle that property terms carry dimensional breadth. Session D should note this in any discussion of how property terms function across the programme. The natan groups also reveal that divine self-giving and human self-giving are structurally parallel — GOD gives out of covenantal faithfulness/compassion; HUMAN gives in echo of that orientation. A cross-cluster comparison with love (R103) and mercy (R111) would be valuable.

operations.description: SD pointer DIM-60-SD001 — property-term dimensional breadth observation for Session D.
Registry stamp — R060 faithfulness DimReview Complete.
